title: DIA data-sat text replacement directive
description: Text-only edit against the revealed body of a target inscription. Not for structural JSON changes; use reinscription on the entry sat instead.

monument_id.description: Monument scope for routing and audit (must match resolver policy).

inscription_id.description: Ordinal inscription id of the target inscription whose content is patched.

target.description: Substring to find in the target inscription body (UTF-8).

replacement.description: Replacement string (UTF-8); may be empty to delete occurrences.

occurrence_index.description: 0-based occurrence index, or -1 for all non-overlapping left-to-right matches.
